description: Substring-search the full Hugging Science catalog (title/description/type/tags) and render matches as markdown or JSON.
rules: read-only — HTTPS GET against huggingscience.co, no mutation
QUERY required — case-insensitive substring across title/description/type/tags
usage: Set QUERY (required). Optional: FILTER, TAG, FORMAT. Output: search.out.
limitation: Needs network to reach huggingscience.co; offline the porter records the failure and emits a non-empty file. Substring-only (no fuzzy/semantic matching).
